phrases.phrase: Βίβλος γενέσεως Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ υἱοῦ Δαυὶδ υἱοῦ Ἀβραάμ.
phrases.translation: The book of the genealogy of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham.
phrases.summary: This line functions as an introduction, stating that what follows is a genealogical record (“book of the generation”) concerning Jesus Christ. It specifically identifies Jesus Christ as the son of David and the son of Abraham.
